case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. MELISSA ANTOUN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $255.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $370.33 AS TO DEFENDANT ANTOUN, MELISSA
